page_content:
Prerequisite: CPSP118.

Restriction: Must be in the College Park Scholars Program.

Repeatable to: 3 credits.

CPSP219 College Park Scholars Second-Year Colloquium II (1-3 Credits) Intermediate colloquium for specific, second year, College Park Scholars Program.

Prerequisite: CPSP218.

Restriction: Must be in the College Park Scholars Program.

Repeatable to: 3 credits if content differs.

CPSP229 Practicum: Online Communication (1-3 Credits) Supervised practicum in Website development. Restriction: Must be in the College Park Scholars Program. Repeatable to: 3 credits if content differs.
